auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Measure API token sent as a Bearer token. Create an API token in the Measure dashboard under Developers > API Token: https://docs.getmeasure.com/pages/guides/quickstart-with-api.

extraFields.label: Company ID
extraFields.description: The Measure company ID with the cmp_ prefix used in API paths. The Measure API quickstart shows this as COMPANY_ID: https://docs.getmeasure.com/pages/guides/quickstart-with-api.

actions.name: create_checkout_session
actions.description: Create a Measure hosted checkout session link.

customerId.description: A Measure customer ID or external customer identifier.

items.description: One official Measure subscription config item.

configItems.description: Subscription configuration items forwarded to Measure.

productPricingIds.description: Product pricing IDs that form the checkout session.

bundlePricingId.description: The bundle pricing ID that forms the checkout session.

term.description: The official Measure subscription term object.

trial.description: Whether the checkout session creates a trial subscription.

trialTerm.description: The official Measure trial term object.

autoCharges.description: Whether the subscription is automatically charged after checkout.

autoRenews.description: Whether the subscription auto-renews at the end of the term.

metadata.description: Metadata key-value pairs forwarded to Measure.

discounts.description: Discounts attached to the checkout session.

items.description: One official Measure one-time item object.

onetimeItems.description: One-time charges attached to the checkout session.

previousSubscriptionId.description: The existing subscription ID whose plan changes with this checkout session.

changeTiming.description: When Measure should apply a subscription plan change.

changeProrationType.description: How Measure should prorate a subscription plan change.

changeResetBillingAnchor.description: Whether Measure should reset the billing anchor for a subscription plan change.

idempotencyKey.description: The optional Measure Idempotency-Key header value for mutation requests.

inputSchema.description: Checkout session fields for creating a Measure hosted checkout link.

anyOf.description: The hosted checkout session URL when returned by Measure.
The Measure customer ID attached to this checkout session.
The checkout session status returned by Measure.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Measure.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Measure checkout session creation response.

actions.name: create_customer
actions.description: Create a Measure customer from JSON-friendly fields.

identifier.description: A unique identifier that ties the customer back to your system.

orgName.description: The organization this customer belongs to.

address.description: The official Measure customer address object.

billingEmails.description: Additional email addresses to copy on customer invoices.

metadata.description: Metadata key-value pairs forwarded to Measure.

tags.description: Tags to attach to the customer.

ownerId.description: The company user ID assigned to manage this customer.

parentCustomerId.description: The parent customer ID for parent-child billing.

excludeFromMetrics.description: Whether Measure should exclude this customer from metrics.

childRollupBilling.description: Whether Measure should enable rollup billing for children.

idempotencyKey.description: The optional Measure Idempotency-Key header value for mutation requests.

inputSchema.description: Customer fields for creating a Measure customer.

anyOf.description: The external customer identifier when returned by Measure.
The computed customer display name.
The customer email address.
The customer's organization name.
The customer status returned by Measure.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Measure.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Measure customer creation response.

actions.name: find_customers
actions.description: Search Measure customers with pagination and official query criteria.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return.

fromKey.description: The pagination cursor returned by a previous Measure find request.

query.description: Official Measure query criteria for this find endpoint.

sortKey.description: The official Measure sort_key value for this find endpoint.

includeMeta.description: Whether Measure should include additional pagination metadata.

anyOf.description: The external customer identifier when returned by Measure.
The computed customer display name.
The customer email address.
The customer's organization name.
The customer status returned by Measure.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Measure.

anyOf.description: The cursor for the next page when Measure returns one.
The page size returned by Measure.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Measure.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Measure customer search response.

actions.name: find_product_pricing
actions.description: Search Measure product pricing records with official query criteria.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return.

fromKey.description: The pagination cursor returned by a previous Measure find request.

query.description: Official Measure query criteria for this find endpoint.

sortKey.description: The official Measure sort_key value for this find endpoint.

includeMeta.description: Whether Measure should include additional pagination metadata.

anyOf.description: The Measure product ID attached to this pricing record.
The product pricing name returned by Measure.
The product pricing currency code.
The product pricing state returned by Measure.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Measure.

items.description: A normalized Measure product pricing record.

productPricing.description: Product pricing records returned by Measure.

anyOf.description: The cursor for the next page when Measure returns one.
The page size returned by Measure.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Measure.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Measure product pricing search response.

includeMeta.description: Whether Measure should include additional pagination metadata.

anyOf.description: The Measure product name.
The external product name returned by Measure.
The product state returned by Measure.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Measure.

anyOf.description: The cursor for the next page when Measure returns one.

actions.name: find_subscriptions
actions.description: Search Measure subscriptions with pagination and official query criteria.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return.

fromKey.description: The pagination cursor returned by a previous Measure find request.

anyOf.description: The Measure customer ID attached to this subscription.
The subscription status returned by Measure.
The subscription currency code.

anyOf.description: The cursor for the next page when Measure returns one.

orgName.description: The organization this customer belongs to.

address.description: The official Measure customer address object.
